questions.q: Why did a federal jury in California rule against Elon Musk in his 2026 lawsuit against OpenAI?
options: He waited too long to file the case
He lacked standing as a former board member
OpenAI proved they remained a non-profit
questions.correctText: He waited too long to file the case

questions.q: In May 2026, an active shooting being investigated as a hate crime left three people dead at which religious facility in Southern California?
A New York judge ruled that which two items found in Luigi Mangione's backpack can be used as evidence in his upcoming trial for the murder of a UnitedHealthcare CEO?
options: A cellphone and a weapon magazine
A flash drive and a mask

questions.q: The Justice Department announced a $1.7 billion 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' to compensate Trump allies in a deal resolving his lawsuit against which federal agency?
In May 2026, the CDC confirmed that an American doctor contracted which deadly virus while working in the Democratic Republic of the Congo?
